title: Ari's Vanilla 3D Mace
description: The 3D Mace pack you've been waiting for!
body:
This pack adds gives maces their bluntness back, giving them a 3D model when in hand while keeping its 2d sprite in the inventory!

![This is how it looks like when held.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e891b05f4e37730118af8f59cbaeb32ce8be79b.png)
This is how it looks like when held.

# How is this pack different from other similar ones?
This pack gives Maces a complete 3D look, including the rod, without adding any unnecessary details or mixels, ensuring an immersive vanilla experience.

If you like this project, make sure to check out my other ones!
